name: Above Ground Level
description: Boutique manufacturer known for nature-themed molds and premium plastic blends. Focuses on versatile, often overstable designs including the Maple approach disc, Beech midrange, and Sycamore fairway driver.

name: Axiom Discs
description: A subsidiary of MVP Disc Sports featuring colorful GYRO overmolds. Known for the Envy, Hex, Mayhem, and Crave.

name: Ching Sports
description: Manufacturer known for recreational discs and family-friendly designs.

name: Clash Discs
description: Finnish manufacturer known for fruit-themed discs and vibrant colors. Home of the Berry putter and Sunshine midrange.

name: Dino Discs
description: Boutique manufacturer known for dinosaur-themed discs popular with families and younger players.

name: Disc Golf Association
description: One of the oldest organizations in disc golf, also producing equipment. Known for the Squall and Sail.

name: Discmania
description: Finnish brand co-founded by Jussi Meresmaa, partnered with Innova for production. Home of the P2, FD, and PD.

name: Discraft
description: One of the oldest disc manufacturers in the world. Official disc of the PDGA and home to the Buzzz, Nuke, and Zone.

name: Divergent Discs
description: Canadian manufacturer known for unique molds and vibrant stamp artwork.

name: Dynamic Discs
description: Part of the Trilogy family. Known for the Judge putter and Truth midrange. One of the fastest-growing brands in disc golf.

name: Elevation Disc Golf
description: Small-batch manufacturer known for premium plastics and limited-edition releases.

name: EV-7
description: Small-batch manufacturer known for premium putter plastics and disc-first design philosophy. Home of the Phi and OG.

name: Gateway Disc Sports
description: Pioneer manufacturer known for soft rubber putters. Home of the legendary Wizard putter used by countless pros.

name: Hyzer Bomb
description: Boutique manufacturer focused on high-performance distance drivers for power throwers.

name: Infinite Discs
description: Utah-based retailer and manufacturer. Produces their own line of discs including the Sphinx, Anubis, and Exodus.

name: Innova Champion Discs
description: The world's largest disc golf manufacturer and pioneer of the modern sport. Home to the Destroyer, Aviar, and Teebird.

name: Kastaplast
description: Swedish manufacturer known for premium plastics and distinctive designs. Home of the Berg, Reko, and Grym.

name: Latitude 64
description: Swedish manufacturer and member of the Trilogy family. Known for the Pure putter, River, and high-glide fairway drivers.

name: Lightning Golf Discs
description: One of the original disc golf manufacturers, still producing classic molds beloved by long-time players.

name: Millennium Golf Discs
description: Pioneer manufacturer using unique organic polymer blends. Known for the Omega, Orion, and Polaris series.

name: Mint Discs
description: Texas-based manufacturer known for animal-themed discs and quality mid-range plastics. Home of the Goat and Freetail.

name: MVP Disc Sports
description: Michigan-based manufacturer known for their unique GYRO overmold technology. Parent company of Axiom and Streamline.

name: Prodigy Disc
description: Founded by disc golf pros. Uses a clean alphanumeric naming system (D1, D2, M3, etc.) and is known for quality plastics.

name: Prodiscus
description: Finnish manufacturer known for their premium Ultra and Basic plastic blends.

name: RPM Discs
description: New Zealand manufacturer with discs named after native birds. Home of the Tui, Kea, and Huia.

name: Streamline Discs
description: The entry-level line from the MVP family, offering the same GYRO technology at accessible price points.

name: Thought Space Athletics
description: Boutique manufacturer known for premium artwork and limited runs. Home of the Mana, Omen, and Synapse.

name: Trash Panda Disc Golf
description: Boutique manufacturer with a devoted following for their affordable, high-quality discs.

name: Westside Discs
description: Finnish manufacturer and the third member of the Trilogy family. Known for the Harp and World.

name: Yikun Discs
description: Chinese manufacturer helping grow the sport in Asia. Produces a full range of discs at competitive price points.
